title: Sharjah delivered scan disputed, photo proof showed wrong door
failure_signature: proof of delivery photo missing or wrong door
prior_action: Opened delivery investigation and requested proof-of-delivery photo before promising refund.
lesson: For delivered-but-not-received disputes, proof-of-delivery review resolved the case faster than promising replacement first.
recommended_playbook: Request proof-of-delivery evidence from courier ops.
Compare scan address, photo, and customer address before approving replacement.
Send customer a grounded investigation update without blaming the customer.

title: Weekend formula delivery with stale scan needed courier manager review
prior_action: Escalated only to standard courier queue.
lesson: Standard courier escalation was too slow for urgent formula; manager review plus substitute path worked after re-escalation.
recommended_playbook: Escalate to courier manager instead of standard queue for urgent formula with stale scan.
Prepare approved substitute or refund path if no verified scan update arrives.
Do not promise an exact ETA until the carrier confirms it.

title: Dubai formula cancellation after payment needed substitute-first recovery
failure_signature: customer asks why item became unavailable
prior_action: Offered substitute SKU first, then original payment refund if substitute was rejected.
lesson: For urgent formula stock cancellation, substitute-first recovery reduced repeat contacts compared with refund-only messaging.
recommended_playbook: Check approved substitute SKU for the same baby-essential need.
Explain stock cancellation without blaming the customer.
Offer original-method refund path if no substitute is accepted.

title: Card refund still within window was resolved by precise payment-rail explanation
prior_action: Explained the card refund window and set monitoring trigger instead of escalating.
lesson: When refund is still inside the card window, precise rail-specific explanation prevents unnecessary escalation.
recommended_playbook: State the verified payment method and refund window.
Avoid promising a faster manual refund.
Add monitoring trigger for the end of the policy window.

title: Overdue return pickup kept failing until partner slot was rebooked
failure_signature: pickup request older than market window
partner failed to assign pickup slot
prior_action: Rescheduled pickup and asked partner for failed-attempt reason.
lesson: Pickup delay cases need partner slot evidence, not only apology text.
recommended_playbook: Create pickup reschedule task with original request timestamp.
Ask partner for failed-attempt reason and next available slot.
Do not promise refund timing until collection is verified.

title: Damaged stroller replacement promised too early caused re-escalation
prior_action: Promised replacement before QC and stock check.
lesson: Replacement promise before evidence and stock review created a second complaint.
recommended_playbook: Collect photo evidence and QC review before replacement approval.
Check stock availability before mentioning replacement.
Tell customer the case is under replacement review, not approved.
